title: angostylis tabulamontana
intro: Angostylis tabulamontana, also known as Tabu montane Angostura, is a plant species from the family Icacinaceae, native to Madagascar. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which is used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Angostylis tabulamontana include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, as well as being used as a natural antiseptic for wounds and skin infections. In traditional herbal preparations, the bark is often dried and made into a tea or infusion, or it is used to create a tincture or decoction for medicinal purposes.
